CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Audio intensity – amplify spectrum in hyperspace
CONTROLS.NAME: spectrum_boost

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Tunnel scroll speed – negative reverses direction
CONTROLS.NAME: speed

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Camera orbit amplitude – controls movement range
CONTROLS.NAME: sway

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Color offset – shifts hue across the tunnel
CONTROLS.NAME: base_color

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: CRT screen effect – adds vignette and scanlines
CONTROLS.NAME: crt_effect

DESCRIPTION: A mesmerizing tunnel of glowing neon lines races toward a luminous heart at the center, each geometric segment pulsing to the audio spectrum. The viewport orbits through the tunnel in an endless Lissajous pattern while segments scroll and rotate, creating a hypnotic sense of motion. Perfect for trance-inducing, immersive audio visualization.
TITLE: Hyperlines
